MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported, (501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Adil Shaikh is present in Pro per
Defendant Terrence Blackman is present.
Defendant Jeff Brewer is present.
Attorney Kimberly Shindel appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Karen Kwong, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of Oct. 21, 2013 is vacated.(501/JPT)
